'''âm-m-p''' ('''kamamap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintessence|quintessence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintessence|quintessence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamamap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamap|thimamap]] || [[word:jimamap|jimamap]] || [[word:shimamap|shimamap]] || [[word:kimamap|kimamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamap|thuthumamap]] || [[word:jujumamap|jujumamap]] || [[word:shushumamap|shushumamap]] || [[word:kukumamap|kukumamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumamap|thumamap]] || [[word:jumamap|jumamap]] || [[word:shumamap|shumamap]] || [[word:kumamap|kumamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumamap|thumamap]] || [[word:jumamap|jumamap]] || [[word:shumamap|shumamap]] || [[word:kumamap|kumamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themamap|themamap]] || [[word:jemamap|jemamap]] || [[word:shemamap|shemamap]] || [[word:kemamap|kemamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomamap|thothomamap]] || [[word:jojomamap|jojomamap]] || [[word:shoshomamap|shoshomamap]] || [[word:kokomamap|kokomamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamap|thomamap]] || [[word:jomamap|jomamap]] || [[word:shomamap|shomamap]] || [[word:komamap|komamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamap|thomamap]] || [[word:jomamap|jomamap]] || [[word:shomamap|shomamap]] || [[word:komamap|komamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmamap|thĂŠmamap]] || [[word:jĂŠmamap|jĂŠmamap]] || [[word:shĂŠmamap|shĂŠmamap]] || [[word:kĂŠmamap|kĂŠmamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamamap|thathamamap]] || [[word:jajamamap|jajamamap]] || [[word:shashamamap|shashamamap]] || [[word:kakamamap|kakamamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamamap|thamamap]] || [[word:jamamap|jamamap]] || [[word:shamamap|shamamap]] || [[word:kamamap|kamamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamamap|thamamap]] || [[word:jamamap|jamamap]] || [[word:shamamap|shamamap]] || [[word:kamamap|kamamap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamamap|shamamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamamap|goshamamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamamap|gokishamamap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamamapnĂŒ|shamamapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamamapnknĂŒ|goshamamapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamapnĂŒ|gokishamamapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamamapshĂ«|shamamapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamamapnkshĂ«|goshamamapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamamapshĂ«|gokishamamapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamapro|shamamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamapnkro|goshamamapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamapro|gokishamamapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamapmu|shamamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamapnkmu|goshamamapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamapmu|gokishamamapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamamapsher|shamamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamamapnksher|goshamamapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamamapsher|gokishamamapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamamapng|shamamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamamapnkng|goshamamapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamamapng|gokishamamapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamamapya|shamamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamamapnkya|goshamamapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamamapya|gokishamamapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamamapyam|shamamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamamapnkyam|goshamamapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamamapyam|gokishamamapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamapnĂŒshĂ«|shamamapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamamapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamamapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamapnĂŒro|shamamapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamapnknĂŒro|goshamamapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamapnĂŒro|gokishamamapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamapnĂŒmu|shamamapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamapnknĂŒmu|goshamamapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamapnĂŒmu|gokishamamapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamapshĂ«nĂŒ|shamamapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamamapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamamapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamapshĂ«ro|shamamapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamapnkshĂ«ro|goshamamapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamapshĂ«ro|gokishamamapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamapshĂ«mu|shamamapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamapnkshĂ«mu|goshamamapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamapshĂ«mu|gokishamamapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamapronĂŒ|shamamapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamapnkronĂŒ|goshamamapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamapronĂŒ|gokishamamapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamaproshĂ«|shamamaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamapnkroshĂ«|goshamamapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamaproshĂ«|gokishamamaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamapromu|shamamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamapnkromu|goshamamapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamapromu|gokishamamapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamapmunĂŒ|shamamapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamapnkmunĂŒ|goshamamapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamapmunĂŒ|gokishamamapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamapmushĂ«|shamamapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamapnkmushĂ«|goshamamapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamapmushĂ«|gokishamamapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamapmuro|shamamapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamapnkmuro|goshamamapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamapmuro|gokishamamapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
